name: zaunekko
description: ZaunEkko's private-first Claude Code marketplace for purpose-specific plugins and documented compatibility distributions.

plugins.name: ekko-plugin-scaffold
plugins.description: A temporary Claude Code plugin scaffold by ZaunEkko. Future original plugins should use purpose-first names like ekko-agy-cli.

plugins.name: commit-commands
plugins.description: A third-party compatibility distribution of Anthropic's commit-commands plugin with dynamic current-model and effort attribution for Git commits. Enable it instead of, not alongside, the official distribution.
